title: Designed for the way you work today
paragraphs: QS is a modern desk system designed for the way people work today. It combines a minimalist form with a solid construction, creating elegant and functional office furniture.

Its clean lines, visually light frame, and timeless character make QS a natural fit for both individual workstations and larger office layouts. It is a collection that brings order to the workspace and supports comfortable everyday work.
packshotImageAlt: QS desk system product shot – L-shaped oak desktop with black steel frame on white background

features.title: Modular Design
features.desc: Infinitely configurable to fit any workspace layout

features.desc: Electric sit-stand mechanism with memory presets
